Dubai City Tour

Maasai Mara Safari

Kenya's crown jewel — spot the Big Five on daily game drives through endless savannah. Hot-air balloon sunrise and Maasai cultural visits available.

  • Big Five game drives
  • Hot-air balloon sunrise
  • Luxury tented camps
  • Maasai cultural visits

Nairobi City Tour

The only capital with a national park inside city limits — Nairobi blends urban energy with wildlife. Visit the elephant orphanage, giraffe centre, and Karen Blixen Museum.

  • Nairobi National Park
  • Elephant orphanage
  • Giraffe Centre
  • Karen Blixen Museum
Family · Budget Inquire on WhatsApp

Diani Beach Holiday

White-sand beach, turquoise Indian Ocean, and coral reefs — Diani is consistently rated Africa's best beach destination. Ideal for honeymoons and family holidays.

  • White-sand beach
  • Snorkelling & diving
  • Luxury beach resorts
  • Water sports & dhow sailing
Honeymoon · Family · Luxury Inquire on WhatsApp

Amboseli Safari

Elephants silhouetted against snow-capped Mount Kilimanjaro — Amboseli delivers the most photographed landscape in Africa. Game drives and lodge stays.

  • Kilimanjaro backdrop
  • Elephant herds
  • Observation hill sunrise
  • Luxury lodges
Adventure · Luxury Inquire on WhatsApp

Lake Naivasha

A peaceful freshwater lake surrounded by papyrus and acacia — boat rides with hippos, Crescent Island walking safari, and flower farm visits.

  • Boat rides with hippos
  • Crescent Island walking safari
  • Flower farm tours
  • Hell’s Gate nearby
Budget · Family Inquire on WhatsApp

Tsavo National Park

Kenya's largest national park — famous for its red-dusted elephants, volcanic Shetani lava flows, and Mzima Springs where you can watch hippos underwater.

  • Red elephants of Tsavo
  • Shetani lava flows
  • Mzima Springs
  • Tsavo East & West
Adventure · Budget Inquire on WhatsApp

Lamu Island

A UNESCO World Heritage site frozen in time — Lamu's narrow lanes, ancient Swahili architecture, and donkey-only streets are unlike anywhere else.

  • UNESCO World Heritage
  • Traditional dhow sailing
  • Swahili architecture
  • No cars — donkeys only

Good Conduct

Apply for your Kenyan Certificate of Good Conduct from UAE or Kenya. Full DCI application, biometrics, and MOFA attestation.

  • From UAE · AED 610 / KES 22,000
  • From Kenya · AED 715 / KES 25,000
  • MOFA attestation included
  • 2–4 weeks processing

Passport Processing

New 66-page Kenyan passport from UAE. We coordinate application, biometrics at the embassy, and delivery.

  • Lost passport · AED 1,120 / KES 40,000
  • 66-page biometric
  • Embassy coordination

Birth Certificate

Kenyan birth certificate attestation for UAE use — Civil Registrar, Bishop House, Foreign Affairs, UAE Embassy, and MOFA.

  • AED 850 / KES 30,000
  • 2–4 day processing
  • Original handed over

Marriage Certificate

  • Kenya attestation · AED 1,800 / KES 65,000
  • Sheria House → MOFA chain

Frequently Asked

Questions, answered.

Everything we get asked most. If yours isn’t here, message us on WhatsApp — we reply in minutes.

Most UAE tourist visas are processed within 24–48 hours after we receive your passport copy and photo. Express processing (8–12 hours) is available for urgent travel. We file directly with the official UAE channels — no third-party middlemen.
We handle everything end to end — flights, visas, hotels, airport pickups, day tours, restaurant bookings, even SIM cards on arrival. You arrive, we’ve already handled it.
In Dubai: cash, card, bank transfer, and crypto. In Nairobi: M-Pesa (George Mucheru, 0712 565 071), bank transfer, and cash at the office. International clients can pay via wire transfer.
Everything is customizable. Our published packages are starting points — tell us your dates, budget, group size, and dream, and we build your itinerary from scratch. No two trips we sell are exactly the same.
Yes — group bookings of 5+ unlock progressive discounts, and corporate accounts get net pricing, monthly invoicing, and a dedicated account manager. Reach out for a quote.
Our 24/7 WhatsApp lines are open even on Eid and Christmas. We rebook, rearrange, and chase airline refunds on your behalf. We also offer travel insurance from leading carriers as an add-on at booking.
Absolutely. Our Dubai office is at Sheikha Mariam Building, Baniyas Square (Office 709-01, 7th Floor), and our Nairobi office is at RNG Plaza House, 5th Floor, Office F18 off Ronald Ngala Street. Walk in any working day.
